title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入斐济：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入斐濟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Fiji DNTMS product conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in project specifications, Energy Fiji Limited (EFL) grid-connection requirements, Fiji fire-safety installation expectations under NFPA 855, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 240/415 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Includes cyclone and coastal salt-mist derating considerations for Pacific island deployment.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与斐济DNTMS产品合格评定要求、项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、斐济电力有限公司（EFL）并网要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及240/415 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。包含太平洋岛屿部署的热带气旋及沿海盐雾降额考量。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與斐濟DNTMS產品合格評定要求、項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、斐濟電力有限公司（EFL）併網要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及240/415 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。包含太平洋島嶼部署的熱帶氣旋及沿海鹽霧降額考量。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DNTMS conformity scope determination, EFL grid-connection approval, FCCC compliance determination, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Fiji DNTMS Technical Regulations, EFL grid-connection technical specifications, Fiji fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, FCCC product safety obligations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DNTMS合格评定范围裁定、EFL并网批准、FCCC合规裁定、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行斐济DNTMS技术法规、EFL并网技术规格、斐济消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规、FCCC产品安全义务及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DNTMS合格評定範圍裁定、EFL併網批准、FCCC合規裁定、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斐濟DNTMS技術法規、EFL併網技術規格、斐濟消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規、FCCC產品安全義務及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Fiji does not have a comprehensive standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to mature certification regimes. BESS projects in Fiji operate under a framework involving: the Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS) for product conformity; the Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission (FCCC) for product safety and market conduct; and Energy Fiji Limited (EFL) for grid-connection technical requirements. Fiji is IEC-aligned with strong Australian/New Zealand standards influence given Pacific regional ties. The key practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Fiji are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline — Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276 are not accepted substitutes; (2) IEC 62933 system-level requirements where referenced in EFL connection agreements or project specifications; (3) NFPA 855-aligned fire safety installation design, as Fiji lacks a dedicated BESS fire code and NFPA is the primary international reference; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation, mandatory under international transport conventions; (5) voltage re-parameterisation — Fiji operates at 240/415 V 50 Hz, whereas China's nominal LV is 220/380 V, sharing 50 Hz frequency but differing in nominal voltage; and (6) coastal tropical derating — Fiji's cyclone zone and salt-mist environment require IP-rated, corrosion-resistant enclosures and structural compliance beyond Chinese domestic standards.
answer_first.zh: 斐济尚无与成熟认证体系相当的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。斐济BESS项目在以下框架下运作：国家贸易计量与标准局（DNTMS）负责产品合格评定；斐济竞争与消费者委员会（FCCC）负责产品安全和市场行为监管；斐济电力有限公司（EFL）负责并网技术要求。斐济采用IEC标准体系，受太平洋地区联系影响，澳大利亚/新西兰标准影响显著。中国BESS出口斐济的主要实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为国际预期基准——中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276不被接受为替代依据；（2）EFL并网协议或项目规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安装设计，斐济缺乏专用BESS消防规范，NFPA是主要国际参考；（4）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（5）电压重新配置——斐济电网为240/415 V 50 Hz，中国额定低压为220/380 V，两者共享50 Hz频率但额定电压不同；（6）沿海热带降额——斐济位于气旋区，盐雾环境要求IP防护等级、耐腐蚀外壳及超出中国国内标准的结构合规。
answer_first.zht: 斐濟尚無與成熟認證體系相當的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。斐濟BESS項目在以下框架下運作：國家貿易計量與標準局（DNTMS）負責產品合格評定；斐濟競爭與消費者委員會（FCCC）負責產品安全和市場行為監管；斐濟電力有限公司（EFL）負責併網技術要求。斐濟採用IEC標準體系，受太平洋地區聯繫影響，澳大利亞/新西蘭標準影響顯著。中國BESS出口斐濟的主要實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為國際預期基準——中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276不被接受為替代依據；（2）EFL併網協議或項目規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全安裝設計，斐濟缺乏專用BESS消防規範，NFPA是主要國際參考；（4）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（5）電壓重新配置——斐濟電網為240/415 V 50 Hz，中國額定低壓為220/380 V，兩者共享50 Hz頻率但額定電壓不同；（6）沿海熱帶降額——斐濟位於氣旋區，鹽霧環境要求IP防護等級、耐腐蝕外殼及超出中國國內標準的結構合規。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
